Text.Page:
Hey, —tell {@LinkCreature:202#1012#Volos} I'd like to talk to him. But he's a demigod, so you can't just go up and say, "Hey, Teroz fancies a chat."

No, for a demigod, you've got to bring an offering...some sort of tribute. Kill a bunch of {@LinkCreature:2#5#hulking sabertooths} on your way over there.

Volos is a hunter. He'll appreciate the gesture.

Teroz in Faevine Vale Camp wants to talk to me, but he sent you? Never heard of this "Teroz."

Now, the name ""—that's a name I'm starting to hear quite a lot.
